feedback.text: The app keeps crashing when I try to upload a file. Very frustrating experience and happens every single time.
Love the new interface! But I wish there was a dark mode option. Would use it every night.
Terrible performance on mobile. Takes forever to load and constantly lags. This is unacceptable for a paid app.
Great customer support team! They helped me solve my issue within minutes.
I'm going to cancel my subscription if you don't fix the login issues. Can't access my account for the third time this week.
Please add integration with Slack. We need this for our team workflow.
The app crashes whenever I try to upload images. Same issue as others reported.
Pricing is confusing. Not sure which plan I need and the website doesn't explain the differences clearly.
Would love to see a dark mode feature. Using the app at night is hard on the eyes.
Export functionality would be amazing! Need to download our data in CSV format.
App is way too slow. Loading times are ridiculous and it's affecting my work.
Login not working again! This keeps happening every few days. I'm done with this product.
Can you add Slack integration? It would make collaboration so much easier for our team.
Upload feature is completely broken. Tried multiple times and the app crashes instantly.
Nice features overall, but would be great to have offline mode for when traveling.
The UI is confusing. Took me 20 minutes to figure out how to do a basic task.
PAYMENT PROCESSING FAILED AND I GOT CHARGED TWICE! This is completely unacceptable!
Could you please add a search function in the dashboard? It's hard to find things without it.
App performance is awful. Loading screens everywhere and constant freezing.
Love most of the features but really need dark mode. Please add this!
Login issue still not fixed. I've been asking for help for weeks and I'm done with this product. Looking for alternatives.
The mobile app is incredibly slow. Takes 30+ seconds just to open.
Please add export to PDF functionality. We need this for our reports.
Great product! The analytics dashboard is exactly what we needed.
File upload keeps crashing the app. This bug needs to be fixed ASAP!
The pricing page is really confusing. Can't figure out which tier includes what features.
Would love Slack integration for notifications and updates.
Login authentication is broken. Can't access my account at all. This is a critical issue!
Solid app but could use better documentation. Some features are hard to discover.
The app is laggy and slow. Performance is terrible compared to competitors.
